'''japate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:utopianly|utopianly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utopianly|utopianly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| japate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:japate|japate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:japatesher|japatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japatesherĂ«m|japatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:japatero|japatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:japateshĂ«|japateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japateshĂ«m|japateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijapatero|gokijapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijapateshĂ«|gokijapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijapateshĂ«m|gokijapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojapankerom|gojapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojapankeshĂ«|gojapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojapankeshĂ«m|gojapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojapankeya|gojapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:japaterom|japaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japatemu|japatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:japateya|japateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijapaterom|gokijapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijapatemu|gokijapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijapateya|gokijapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:japapate|japapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:japapatesher|japapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japapatesherĂ«m|japapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:japapatero|japapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:japapateshĂ«|japapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japapateshĂ«m|japapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijapapatero|gokijapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijapapateshĂ«|gokijapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijapapateshĂ«m|gokijapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojapapankerom|gojapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojapapankeshĂ«|gojapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojapapankeshĂ«m|gojapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojapapankeya|gojapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:japapaterom|japapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japapatemu|japapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:japapateya|japapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijapapaterom|gokijapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijapapatemu|gokijapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijapapateya|gokijapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠte|jĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠtesher|jĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠtero|jĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠtero|gokijĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠterom|jĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠtemu|jĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠteya|jĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠterom|gokijĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠpĂŠteya|gokijĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafpafte|jafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafpaftesher|jafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafpaftesherĂ«m|jafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafpaftero|jafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafpafteshĂ«|jafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafpafteshĂ«m|jafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafpaftero|gokijafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafpafteshĂ«|gokijafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafpafteshĂ«m|gokijafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafpafnkerom|gojafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafpafnkeshĂ«|gojafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafpafnkeshĂ«m|gojafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafpafnkeya|gojafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafpafterom|jafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafpaftemu|jafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafpafteya|jafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafpafterom|gokijafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafpaftemu|gokijafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafpafteya|gokijafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
